title: johrenia candollei
intro: Johrenia candollei, also known as the sweet fern or candolle fern, is a flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, thanks to its flavonoids and terpenoids content. Johrenia candollei can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into herbal remedies.
